entries.body: The wildcat action began at the night shift. Cranes idle, 6,000 boxes stranded. Dockers hold the gate until the fired stewards are reinstated.
entries.title: Port workers walk out in solidarity; container terminal at a standstill

entries.body: Four hundred households on Sonnenallee are now withholding rent — the largest coordinated tenant action since the 2023 deposit fight. The union answered eviction filings with a block-by-block watch.
entries.title: Rent strike jumps three more blocks as tenants tear up eviction notices

entries.body: Four unmarked units, invoiced under "traffic safety." The contract and vendor spec sheet are published in full.
entries.title: Leaked procurement docs show the city quietly bought facial-recognition vans

entries.body: Eyewitness report from the strike blocks. Bring water and legal-observer numbers.
entries.title: Cops massing at the north gate, roughly forty vans

entries.body: Volunteers are staffing a first-aid point at the west entrance. Water and shade available.
entries.title: Medic station open at the old library, side entrance

entries.body: Low-altitude drone seen over the rent-strike blocks for the past twenty minutes.
entries.title: Drone overhead on Sonnenallee, circling the strike blocks
